title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Rustomjee Group - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Rustomjee Group - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Rustomjee Group has an exciting opening for a Sales Manager at our Amritsar office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Rustomjee Group:
Rustomjee Group is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Property Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual performance appraisal
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Rustomjee Group!
